All of these companies have implemented batch numbers, testing history and QR codes.
I am doing these in alphabetical order for fairness.

### [**Glacier Aminos**](https://glacieraminos.shop/?ref=graymarket)

They are starting out small right now, but setup to grow. The owner is our own [@papapotato](https://thegraymarket.net/members/papapotato/) who has been with us since day one. He passionate about service and you can reach him here if there are questions! He will take care of you or he’s fired! Haha
Their RT10 is at $50 and his R20 is at $94. They also have 3 vial, 5 vial and 10 vial bundles where you can mix and match products. R10 kit is $292 with coupon
Standard ground shipping is free til Sept 20th with $10 2-day air, And free 2-day are over $250
They have a 5% off code that is for Gray Market members only. The code is graymarket.
[**Sunrise Bioresearch**](https://sunrisebioresearch.com)
I got to know Sean the owner of Sunrise Bioresearch over the course of the last few months. He would hang out in my lives. Instead of consulting with him, he just paid attention to what I was saying and implemented all the Batch Numbers and QR codes. We eventually talked and I convinced him to lower his Reta prices down. He only sells a few products. His R20 is at $90.
His main market is in 5-pack kits of Reta for $259 which come in a little slide case. And four pack researcher kits that come with a GLP1, Tesamorelin, GHK-CU and BPC-157.
He has a onetime use only discount code of WELCOME10 which is good on Tirzepatide and Retatrutide single vials. It is not an affiliate code. This code is not for publication, it’s a guerrilla word of mouth code for customers to tell their friends. He will not be doing codes or affiliates because his prices are already low like others on this page.

### [**WelliLabs**](https://wellilabs.com)

Wellilabs is a new company. I also got to know them from my lives and page. Originally, I sort of ignored them, but then one day I gave them a call. This guys organization is next level and he has the best testing I have seen in the industry. He is also doing 3 vials for mass and purity along with endotoxins and heavy metals. I have been keeping him close to my chest because his current inventory is small.
On his site you will be able to put in your order number and it will literally tell you what your order was, and the batch numbers that were sent along with links to the COAs.
His prices for Reta are R10 for 50, R20 for 90. He is also going to have pick and choose kits.
